heading: Regulation of the sale and transfer of ammonium nitrate
label: 488a Regulation of the sale and transfer of ammonium nitrate

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary shall regulate the sale and transfer of ammonium nitrate by an ammonium nitrate facility in accordance with this part to prevent the misappropriation or use of ammonium nitrate in an act of terrorism. Such regulations shall be carried out by the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency.

children.heading: Ammonium nitrate mixtures
children.label: b Ammonium nitrate mixtures
children.text: Not later than 90 days after , the Secretary, in consultation with the heads of appropriate Federal departments and agencies (including the Secretary of Agriculture), shall, after notice and an opportunity for comment, establish a threshold percentage for ammonium nitrate in a substance.December 26, 2007

children.heading: Registration of owners of ammonium nitrate facilities
children.label: c Registration of owners of ammonium nitrate facilities
A
children.text: owns an ammonium nitrate facility is required to register with the Department; and

children.label: B
children.text: registers under subparagraph (A) is issued a registration number for purposes of this part.

children.label: A
children.text: the name, address, and telephone number of each ammonium nitrate facility owned by that person;

children.label: B
children.text: the name of the person designated by that person as the point of contact for each such facility, for purposes of this part; and

children.label: C
children.text: such other information as the Secretary may determine is appropriate.

children.heading: Registration of ammonium nitrate purchasers
children.label: d Registration of ammonium nitrate purchasers
A
children.text: intends to be an ammonium nitrate purchaser is required to register with the Department; and

children.label: B
children.text: registers under subparagraph (A) is issued a registration number for purposes of this part.

children.label: A
children.text: the name, address, and telephone number of the applicant; and

children.label: B
children.text: the intended use of ammonium nitrate to be purchased by the applicant.

children.label: A
children.text: maintain a record of each sale or transfer of ammonium nitrate, during the two-year period beginning on the date of that sale or transfer; and

children.label: B
children.text: include in such record the information described in paragraph (2).

children.label: A
children.text: record the name, address, telephone number, and registration number issued under subsection (c) or (d) of each person that purchases ammonium nitrate, in a manner prescribed by the Secretary;

children.label: B
children.text: if applicable, record the name, address, and telephone number of an agent acting on behalf of the person described in subparagraph (A), at the point of sale;

children.label: C
children.text: record the date and quantity of ammonium nitrate sold or transferred; and

children.label: D
children.text: verify the identity of the persons described in subparagraphs (A) and (B), as applicable, in accordance with a procedure established by the Secretary.

children.heading: Protection of information
children.label: 3 Protection of information
children.text: In maintaining records in accordance with paragraph (1), the owner of an ammonium nitrate facility shall take reasonable actions to ensure the protection of the information included in such records.

children.heading: Exemption for explosive purposes
children.label: f Exemption for explosive purposes
children.text: The Secretary may exempt from this part a person producing, selling, or purchasing ammonium nitrate exclusively for use in the production of an explosive under a license or permit issued under chapter 40 of title 18.

children.heading: Consultation
children.label: g Consultation
children.text: In carrying out this section, the Secretary shall consult with the Secretary of Agriculture, States, and appropriate private sector entities, to ensure that the access of agricultural producers to ammonium nitrate is not unduly burdened.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Notwithstanding or the USA PATRIOT ACT (; ), and except as provided in paragraph (2), the Secretary may not disclose to any person any information obtained under this part.section 552 of title 5Public Law 107–56115 Stat. 272

children.label: A
children.text: an officer or employee of the United States, or a person that has entered into a contract with the United States, who has a need to know the information to perform the duties of the officer, employee, or person; or

children.label: B
children.text: to a State agency under , under appropriate arrangements to ensure the protection of the information.section 488c of this title

children.heading: Registration procedures and check of terrorist screening database
children.label: i Registration procedures and check of terrorist screening database

children.heading: Generally
children.label: A Generally
children.text: The Secretary shall establish procedures to efficiently receive applications for registration numbers under this part, conduct the checks required under paragraph (2), and promptly issue or deny a registration number.

children.heading: Initial six-month registration period
children.label: B Initial six-month registration period
children.text: The Secretary shall take steps to maximize the number of registration applications that are submitted and processed during the six-month period described in .section 488e(e) of this title

children.heading: Check required
children.label: A Check required
children.text: The Secretary shall conduct a check of appropriate identifying information of any person seeking to register with the Department under subsection (c) or (d) against identifying information that appears in the terrorist screening database of the Department.

children.heading: Authority to deny registration number
children.label: B Authority to deny registration number
children.text: If the identifying information of a person seeking to register with the Department under subsection (c) or (d) appears in the terrorist screening database of the Department, the Secretary may deny issuance of a registration number under this part.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Following the six-month period described in , the Secretary shall, to the extent practicable, issue or deny registration numbers under this part not later than 72 hours after the time the Secretary receives a complete registration application, unless the Secretary determines, in the interest of national security, that additional time is necessary to review an application.section 488e(e) of this title

children.heading: Notice of application status
children.label: B Notice of application status
children.text: In all cases, the Secretary shall notify a person seeking to register with the Department under subsection (c) or (d) of the status of the application of that person not later than 72 hours after the time the Secretary receives a complete registration application.

children.heading: Appeals process
children.label: i Appeals process
children.text: The Secretary shall establish an expedited appeals process for persons denied a registration number under this part.

children.heading: Time period for resolution
children.label: ii Time period for resolution
children.text: The Secretary shall, to the extent practicable, resolve appeals not later than 72 hours after receiving a complete request for appeal unless the Secretary determines, in the interest of national security, that additional time is necessary to resolve an appeal.

children.heading: Consultation
children.label: B Consultation
children.text: The Secretary, in developing the appeals process under subparagraph (A), shall consult with appropriate stakeholders.

children.heading: Guidance
children.label: C Guidance
children.text: The Secretary shall provide guidance regarding the procedures and information required for an appeal under subparagraph (A) to any person denied a registration number under this part.

children.heading: Restrictions on use and maintenance of information
children.label: 5 Restrictions on use and maintenance of information

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Any information constituting grounds for denial of a registration number under this section shall be maintained confidentially by the Secretary and may be used only for making determinations under this section.

children.heading: Sharing of information
children.label: B Sharing of information
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this part, the Secretary may share any such information with Federal, State, local, and tribal law enforcement agencies, as appropriate.

children.heading: Authority to require information
children.label: A Authority to require information
children.text: The Secretary may require a person applying for a registration number under this part to submit such information as may be necessary to carry out the requirements of this section.

children.heading: Requirement to update information
children.label: B Requirement to update information
children.text: The Secretary may require persons issued a registration under this part to update registration information submitted to the Secretary under this part, as appropriate.

children.heading: Re-checks
children.label: A Re-checks
children.text: The Secretary shall, as appropriate, recheck persons provided a registration number pursuant to this part against the terrorist screening database of the Department, and may revoke such registration number if the Secretary determines such person may pose a threat to national security.

children.heading: Notice of revocation
children.label: B Notice of revocation
children.text: The Secretary shall, as appropriate, provide prior notice to a person whose registration number is revoked under this section and such person shall have an opportunity to appeal, as provided in paragraph (4).
